description: Style Notebasics adds a sense of sophistication and style to your outfit with this belt. With a rustic and contemporary look, tune up your style quotient with this belt - wear with denim shorts, jeans, or even light coloured formal pants.Product DetailsBrown coloured belt, belt segment hinged with metal loop and at metal buckle, five  buckle holesMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
